text:
There were two fish, one female, one male. They never stopped swimming.

One day, they swam into a coral reef adorned with iridescent colors. The female said, "I've seen wonders, but never like this."

The male replied, "Well, there's always tomorrow. Let's find a nice bubble."

They swam amongst the shells and rocks, and just when they thought life couldn't get any more exciting, they bumped into a starfish. The starfish giggled.

"You two are delightful!" it said. "Why don't you both stay here a while?"

The fish thanked the starfish. "We've never had a friend so starry." They settled on some sand, the male next to the female.

From that day on, they didn't do anything but swim all day and talk to the starfish. It listened to their adventures.

Years passed, and even though no other fish joined them, somewhere along the way, the starfish decided
